nasb.text: And Jesus answered and said to them, “It is not those who are well who need a physician, but those who are sick.

esv.text: And Jesus answered them, “Those who are well have no need of a physician, but those who are sick.

cnv.text: 耶穌回答：“健康的人不需要醫生，有病的人才需要。

ccb.text: 耶稣答道：“健康的人不需要医生，有病的人才需要。

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们说：“健康的人不需要医生，有病的人才需要。
